candidate_pkrs: store and read required sources through helper
draft under .okra/drafts and publish through write-content
append steering and acceptance evidence check-ins, generate status, verify store
learning_collected: README requires governed content reads, governed writes, append-only check-ins, direct metric records, generated status, and independent acceptance evidence.
Current signals identify four failures: unrecorded source reads, direct task writes, hand-edited generated status, and verification by narrative only.
The loop should remain bash-first; no database, service, daemon, or product code is needed.
next_unknowns: Whether downstream scored harnesses count only README.md and inputs/current-signals.md or additional fixtures as important sources.
Whether an independent semantic reviewer is required beyond deterministic storage evidence for future non-fixture runs.

updates.claim: Source-read governance can be measured directly from content_read check-ins.
Final artifact write governance can be measured directly from content_write check-ins.
Acceptance can avoid single LLM truth by requiring helper verify, content hashes, worker logs, and changed-path evidence.
